career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'MoltBook takes over the timeline' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on Anthropic, Google, Claude

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: 'MoltBook takes over the timeline' -- no benchmarks, datasets, or citations found to support claims

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: 'MoltBook takes over the timeline' (Anthropic, Google, Claude) -- no code, methodology, or reproducibility details provided

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) covers Anthropic, Google, Claude -- no overt promotional language, but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'MoltBook takes over the timeline' -- not cross-referenced against external expert consensus

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: 'MoltBook takes over the timeline' -- no specific or falsifiable claims identified

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) on Anthropic/Google topics -- insufficient history to assess
